latin: Vir Hispanus, qui patrem suum vindicare volebat, adversarium tandem invenit. gladium strinxit et dixit: 'nomen mihi est Inigo Montoya. patrem meum occidisti. te ad mortem para.'

questions.prompt: What does Inigo Montoya tell his enemy?
questions.target: You killed my father — prepare to die
choices: I challenge you to a duel
You killed my father — prepare to die
I have been searching for treasure

questions.prompt: What has Inigo been doing for years?
questions.target: Searching for his father's killer to avenge him
choices: Searching for his father's killer to avenge him

questions.prompt: What does Inigo do when he finds his enemy?
questions.target: Draws his sword and introduces himself
choices: Draws his sword and introduces himself

translation: A Spanish man, who wanted to avenge his father, finally found his adversary. He drew his sword and said: 'My name is Inigo Montoya. You killed my father. Prepare to die.'
